prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original *Tadek Marek 3.7L (DBA/DB4GT) inline-6* with a *JE Pistons forged 9.5:1 compression ratio slugs* (PN: 37000-9.5) paired with *Manley Performance 4340 steel connecting rods* (PN: 14065-8) to handle 8,500 RPM redline under *Aviaid dry-sump oiling system* (PN: 1000-1) for sustained high-G cornering.

Forced Induction: Install a *Garrett GT35R turbocharger* (PN: 709999-5001S) with *Tial 44mm external wastegate* (PN: MV-R) and *Custom Fabrication Services (CFS) 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold* (DB4GT-specific flange pattern) to target 380 HP at 12 PSI on *Sunoco GT260+ race fuel*.

Suspension: Swap to *Öhlins TTX40 coilovers* (PN: DB4GT-01) with *Eibach ERS 1000N/mm springs* (PN: 200-100-010) and *SuperPro polyurethane bushings* (PN: SPF1001K) for the *DB4GT-specific trailing arms*, reducing unsprung weight by 18% while maintaining Zagato body roll stiffness.
estetica: Body: Replace the original *Zagato aluminum panels* with *CP Tech carbon fiber replica Zagato shell* (PN: DB4GT-ZAG-001) featuring *3M Scotchcal Matte Satin Vinyl Wrap* (PN: 1080-M227) in *Aston Martin Racing Green* (RAL 6001) with *custom hand-painted gold pinstriping* by *Paul Dalton Designs*.

Wheels: Fit *Dymag Carbon Revolution CR9 16x6.5 ET25* (PN: CR9-1665-ET25) with *Pirelli P Zero Corsa 6.0/16x16* tires (PN: 315/60R16) and *Brembo GT 6-piston calipers* (PN: 09.9605.75) with *355mm two-piece rotors* (PN: 09.8905.11) for period-correct aggression.

Interior: Retrim the original *Connolly leather* with *Bridge of Weir Vaumol hides* (PN: VML-001) in *Tobacco Brown* and install *MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel* (PN: 0101780113) wrapped in *Alcantara suede* (PN: 1000-001) with *Smiths 8,000 RPM chronometric tachometer* (PN: RVI/8000) for vintage motorsport authenticity.
